nodes.label: Python-flavored dump and die (dd) for FastAPI.  Laravel-style expand/collapse +
Raised by dd() inside a request; handler returns dump HTML + HTTP 500.
Attach request flag + DdException handler. Idempotent.
Auto-wire every FastAPI() instance. User only imports dd.
Pick object to inspect.getsource / getfile from.
Return {file, lines, code} for value or its class. None if unavailable.
Collapsible HTML panel with file tip + source code (collapsed by default).
Compact FastAPI dump — skip routers/middleware guts.
Poll until server accepts connections, then open browser once.
Serve dump via running FastAPI app. No temp file. No process kill.
Dump vars to stdout. No stop.
Dump vars + die.      - Inside HTTP request → HTML 500 on that response     - Mo
